title: Half-Life of Everything
description: A meditative generative canvas piece marking 47 years since Three Mile Island — radioactive green decay slowly bleeds into Martian red as particle systems simulate invisible loss, with live clocks counting time elapsed since the meltdown.

title: THE BROADSHEET THAT CANNOT BE FOUND
description: A living protest broadsheet — typeset in ink-black and newsprint-white — that reassembles its headlines every few seconds, weaving today's real events (antimatter on roads, time crystals, No Kings marches) into an ever-shifting front page that refuses to stay still.

title: THRONE FOR SALE — Going Once, Going Forever
description: A live auction for the Roman Imperial Throne, running since 193 AD — bids accepted in any currency, buyers warned that all previous owners were assassinated, with a countdown to Earth Hour and a live "NO KINGS" protest counter crashing the sale.
